description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the cypress/internal:cy-0.19.2 Docker image and sets npm_config_loglevel to warn. Define a single stage named test and add a cypress-e2e job in that stage. In the before_script run npm install then npm run build. In the script echo 'Spec folder', list the cypress/integration directory with ls, and execute cypress run. Configure the job to keep artifacts for one week, storing cypress/screenshots and cypress/videos, with no additional triggers.
